chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.564 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application --------------------------------------------- 05.05.2025 Mr. Liaquat Ali Hamid Meyo, advocate for applicant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh PI Sikandar Ali of PS PIB Colony, Karachi Complainant present in person ------------------------------------ Applicant/accused Usama son of Aminuddin seeks post arrest bail in FIR No.120/2023, registered at P.S. PIB Colony, Karachi for offence under sections 394, 397, 302, PPC after rejection of his bail plea by learned trial Court vide order dated 15.02.2025. Learned counsel for applicant, after arguing the matter at some length, does not press this criminal bail application and seeks direction to the trial Court to decide the case of the applicant preferably within a period of six months. Learned Additional Prosecutor General Sindh has recorded no objection on such proposal. In view of above, instant criminal bail application is dismissed on merits. However, learned trial Court is directed to decide the case of the applicant preferably within a period of six months. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
